title: New employer registration → approval
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: New employer registration → approval

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Open Sign In page
steps.observe: Registration path for new employer — manual account creation.

steps.label: Create employer account — manual
steps.observe: Fill company and admin details; verify email from inbox (context email_verification).

steps.label: Open Email delivery logs
steps.observe: Search registrant login email; context registration_approved or email_verification.
